=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/returnEffectInGen.ts(5,3): suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)


==== /.src/returnEffectInGen.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const shouldWarn = Effect.gen(function*() {
      return Effect.fail("error")
      ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
    })
